---
date: "Date: `r Sys.Date()`"
output:
    html_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 3
        toc_float: true
        theme: cerulean
geometry: margin = 2cm
---

# Results of CAGEr analysis

### Tag region annotation
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
tagannot_plot <- readRDS("tag_region_annotation_plot.rds")
tagannot_plot
```

### Correlation
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
corr_m <- readRDS("corr_m.rds")
hm_plot <- readRDS("correlations_plot.rds")
if (!is.null(eval(hm_plot$call))){
    eval(hm_plot$call)
} else {
    print(hm_plot)
}
```

### TSS logo
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
tss_plot <- readRDS("TSSlogos_plot.rds")
tss_plot + ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 90))
```

### Normalization
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
revc_plot <- readRDS("reverse_cumulative_plot.rds")
revc_plot
```

### Promoter width
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
iqw_plot <- readRDS("interquartile_width_tagclusters_plot.rds")
iqw_plot
```

### CTSS counts
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
ctssc_plot <- readRDS("ctss_counts_plot.rds")
ctssc_plot
```

### Tagcluster annotation
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
chta_plot <- readRDS("chipseeker_tagCluster_annotation_plot.rds")
chta_plot
```

### Nucleotide and dinucleotide frequencies in tagclusters
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
nucl_plot <- readRDS("nucleotide_frequencies_plot.rds")
nucl_plot

dinucl_plot <- readRDS("dinucleotide_frequencies_plot.rds")
dinucl_plot + ggplot2::theme(
    text=ggplot2::element_text(size=5),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 90, size=5),
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size=5))
```

### Consensus cluster TPM counts
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
cc_plot <- readRDS("consensus_counts_plot.rds")
cc_plot
```

### Consensus cluster PCA
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
cc_plot <- readRDS("consensus_clusters_pca_plot.rds")
cc_plot
```
